analysis.consistency: The data appears consistent with standard D&D 5e spell descriptions. Level, school, casting time, range, components, and duration align with typical spell structures.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is complete, covering duration, action economy (using an action to see the aura), range limitations, and the specific penetration rules for barriers.

mechanics.action_economy: Standard action to activate sensing capability after initial casting.
mechanics.concentration: Yes, standard for ongoing detection spells.
mechanics.utility: Excellent low-level utility for identifying magical items, traps, or sources of ambient magic. Barrier penetration rules are specific and mechanical.
